title: Ida Who Sang So Badly Even the Dead Rose Up and Joined Her in Song
original_title: Ida, ki je pela tako grdo, da so še mrtvi vstali od mrtvih in zapeli z njo
overview: Ten-year-old Ida believes that the mysterious angelic singing resounding across the village graveyard is the only thing keeping her beloved Grandma alive. So she decides to join the school choir-even though she is absolutely tone deaf.
